name: presentation-feature-video-ads
notes: Progressive-disclosure public skill pack with zero-dependency HTML delivery, a shared PresentationPlayer library, full-viewport static per-scene backgrounds, 9:16 mobile recheck for every scene, generated visual preview cards, curated anti-AI-slop templates, text-light motion-heavy scenes, 20+ micro-scenes on normal content, and fixed 16:9 / 9:16 production-quality output.
